clusters.label: Identity & Portability
clusters.description: Concepts about handles, DIDs, verification, recovery, migration, and user-controlled identity across services.

clusters.label: Protocol & Lexicons
clusters.description: Core AT Protocol concepts for record types, schemas, endpoints, sync, and app-layer APIs.

clusters.label: Feeds & Ranking
clusters.description: Ways of selecting, ordering, and browsing content, including custom feeds, finite scroll, prioritization, and discovery logic.

clusters.label: Moderation & Safety
clusters.description: Tools, labels, reporting, enforcement, and community practices for reducing harm and maintaining safe online spaces.

clusters.label: Trust & Verification
clusters.description: Trust frameworks for deciding who or what to believe, including verification graphs, reputation, attestations, and trusted channels.

clusters.label: Privacy & Security
clusters.description: Privacy, encryption, anonymous participation, secure messaging, and technical protections against surveillance or compromise.

clusters.label: Decentralization
clusters.description: Architecture and governance choices that distribute control across independent hosts, relays, clients, and communities.

clusters.label: Community Governance
clusters.description: How communities define membership, roles, stewardship, rules, and collective decision-making in decentralized spaces.

clusters.label: Creator Economy
clusters.description: Funding, patronage, subscriptions, sponsorships, and audience-building strategies for creators, journalists, and independent projects.

clusters.label: Research Workflows
clusters.description: Tools and methods for literature discovery, synthesis, extraction, appraisal, and continuous review.

clusters.label: Science Data
clusters.description: Scientific datasets, repositories, identifiers, and infrastructure for publishing and reusing research outputs.

clusters.label: Graph Discovery
clusters.description: Social graph visualization, migration, matching, and cross-platform discovery of accounts and communities.

clusters.label: Media & Video
clusters.description: Video, audio, streaming, playback, and media rights across social apps and creator platforms.

clusters.label: Documents & Publishing
clusters.description: Writing, editing, translation, localization, and document formats used for publishing and shared authorship.

clusters.label: UI & Design
clusters.description: Interface patterns, interaction models, visual styles, and product design choices that shape user experience.

clusters.label: Developer Tools
clusters.description: SDKs, libraries, runtimes, build systems, deployment tools, and implementation patterns for builders.

clusters.label: Open Science & Research
clusters.description: Projects and ideas for making scientific communication modular, interoperable, and more open to reuse and contribution.

clusters.label: Governance & Policy
clusters.description: Institutional, legal, corporate, and standards-body questions that shape how the ecosystem is run.

clusters.description: Academic and qualitative research on platforms, communities, media effects, and information flows.

clusters.label: Platform Interoperability
clusters.description: Bridging, federation, and cross-service compatibility across social networks, apps, and publishing systems.

clusters.label: Business Models
clusters.description: Commercial and nonprofit strategies for sustaining apps, infrastructure, journalism, and creator projects.

clusters.description: Standards bodies, specifications, serialization formats, and interoperability mechanisms that support the ecosystem.
